name: Bayer AG
lede: Bayer runs nine centers across five Indian cities. Mumbai, Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Udaipur and Karnal, covering GBS, SSC, R&D and CoE, built over 21 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Bayer office in India. We map nine, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Bayer AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Bayer runs 9 verified centers across 5 Indian cities (Mumbai, Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Udaipur, Karnal), covering GBS, SSC, R&D and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Bayer's India footprint covers Mumbai, Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Udaipur and Karnal, spanning GBS, SSC, R&D and CoE. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 73 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Bayer operate in India?
faq.a: Bayer operates 9 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Bayer have centers in?
faq.a: Bayer's India footprint includes Mumbai and 4 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Bayer run in India?
faq.a: Bayer runs GBS and 3 additional center types in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Bayer's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Bayer's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Bayer's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Bayer's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
